text: Stepping into this space, I feel a vivid sense of anticipation. The purple glow and glass barrier evoke a feeling of separation and threshold—on one side, the ordinary world, and on the other, a portal to curiosity and innovation. As I draw close to the R+D wall, I sense inspiration and alertness, noticing the invitation to reflect on how humans connect, coexist, and create. My mind awakens, hungry to taste the ideas on display. I feel ready to question, to wander, and to observe—both immersed and at a contemplative distance. This is not just a room; it is an opening to meaning.
